3173780.name: Toadled: Eating Frenzy
3173780.description:
Toadled: Eating Frenzy is an action roguelike with an appetite! Play as a toad and eat everything on your path to grow bigger and mutate into new, disgusting forms. Consuming human flesh? Fair game. Police cars, tanks, missiles? Mild indigestion. Try out hundreds of appetizing build combinations!

Toadled: Eating Frenzy is a reimagination of our classic hit Toadled, originally released in 2016. New features, content, increased replayability, boss fights, live events, and other surprises await!

Eat, Grow, Mutate 🍽️

When a toad gains the ability to mutate with everything he eats, the goal becomes clear: devour the entire universe! From strange, hideous to wondrous toad forms, each bite makes you stronger and weirder. Ever wonder what a human tastes like? Or if a nuclear missile causes heartburn? There’s always something new to discover!

Upgrade Like Never Before ⏫

Build the ultimate toad with a flexible upgrade system, new mutations, buddies, and item combos. Turtle shell saw blades? Lightning tongue? Mix and match your upgrades and discover new, wacky ways to dominate each run. Each playthrough is a fresh opportunity to try something new.

More, more, more! 💯

Dress up your toad in ridiculous hats and other gear by dominating challenges and rising to the top of the leaderboards. Discover secrets and surprises. Fight tenacious bosses!

In a nutshell 🌰

Toadled: Eating Frenzy offers:

  • 3 stages of difficulty 💪

  • 20+ interconnected levels 🗺️

  • 40+ enemies 👹

  • At least one boss fight 👀

  • 50+ quests ❗️

  • 15+ challenge runs 🎯

  • 20 upgradeable items 🎁

  • 10 stat buffing mutations 🧬

  • Unique music for every level 🎵

  • 25+ wearable items you can unlock 🎩

  • Timed live events with even more wearables to win ⏱️

  • Leaderboards to compete with other players 📈
